theme: Turn Dream, wiki/forge, and RPI into always-on AgentOps daemon product loops backed by GasCity, supervised headless workers, durable state, and OpenClaw-readable snapshots.
ranking_basis: GasCity API/SSE adapter work precedes daemon jobs that depend on it.
The daemon ledger, projection rebuilders, HTTP threat model, mutation ack contract, and foreground readiness proof precede RPI, Dream, wiki, and consumer mutation surfaces.
Headless Codex/Claude worker lifecycle is a reusable AgentWorker runtime before wiki/forge consumes it.
OpenClaw begins as a stable consumer projection contract because local OpenClaw source is not present.
Hardening is limited to service lifecycle, migration, observability, compatibility, and proof.
